en: Hello everyone. This is your daily dose of vocabulary.
Efficacy Efficacy means the ability to produce a desired
or intended result. Some synonyms for efficacy are effectiveness, successfulness, productiveness,
fruitfulness, potency and usefulness. The opposite of efficacy is inefficacy. Some usage
examples are. Vaccines exist, but their efficacy against
aerosolized plague is unknown. They praise for spiritual welfare and believe
in the efficacy of such prayers. Please check out the next video and don't forget to subscribe.
